case_title: GUILLERMO VALDEZ VS. UNITED HEALTHCARE SERVICES, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-09-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-09-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY RAYNA MCDERMOTT--SR. CONTRACT MGR. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO COSTS, IFP FILED BY PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF VALDEZ, GUILLERMO ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
